positive: An aesthetically pleasing geometric arrangement featuring stylized mountain ranges and abstract forest silhouettes against a gradient sky. The design uses a limited, earthy color palette: deep indigo, terracotta orange, forest green, and creamy sandstone. Compositionally, the elements are centered and balanced, creating a repeating, modular pattern suitable for all-over print. Include sharp, clean line work and solid color fills. Style should be a fusion of mid-century modern graphic design and Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e), with a high contrast and vector-art crispness. Perfect for a print-on-demand t-shirt or tote bag, isolated on a neutral background.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, brand, messy, cluttered, blurry, grain, noisy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, artifacts, realistic photography
